初回は索引構築で数分かかりうる\n                yield f\"data: {json.dumps({'delta': body}, ensure_ascii=False)}\\n\\n\"\n                if cites:\n                    cites = rag.resolve_citation_filenames(rag_ns, cites)\n                    yield (\n                        f\"data: {json.dumps({'citations': cites}, ensure_ascii=False)}\\n\\n\"\n                    )\n            except Exception as e:\n                logger.exception(\"%s rag failed\", _rag_label)\n                err = {\"error\": f\"{_rag_label} RAGの実行に失敗しました: {str(e)[:200]}\"}\n                yield f\"data: {json.dumps(err, ensure_ascii=False)}\\n\\n\"\n            yield \"data: [DONE]\\n\\n\"\n\n        return StreamingResponse(\n            sa_gen(), media_type=\"text/event-stream\", headers=SSE_HEADERS\n        )\n\n    if req.agent and req.rag:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=\"agent and rag cannot be combined\")\n\n    # 画像入力(MM-01): visionモデル必須・agent/rag併用不可・最終メッセージはuser\n    if req.images:\n        if not MODELS[req.model].vision:\n            raise HTTPException(\n                status_code=422, detail=\"selected model does not support images\"\n            )\n        if req.agent or req.rag or req.agent_id:\n            raise HTTPException(\n                status_code=422, detail=\"images cannot be combined with agent/rag\"\n            )\n        if req.messages[-1].role != \"user\":\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail=\"last message must be user\")\n        for u in req.images:\n            if not u.startswith(\"data:image/\"):\n                raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail=\"images must be data URIs\")\n            if len(u) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:\n                raise HTTPException(status_code=413, detail=\"image too large (max 2MB)\")\n        if sum(len(u) for u in req.images) > 10 * 1024 * 1024:\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=413, detail=\"images too large (max 10MB total)\")\n\n    # エージェント定義の適用(AGT-03)\n    agent_def: dict | None = None\n    if req.agent_id:\n        agent_def = await asyncio.to_thread(\n            agents_repo.get_agent, user.subject, req.agent_id\n        )\n        if not agent_def:\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"agent not found\")\n\n    # 保存済みagentの実行経路 (1)(2) は agent_dispatch へ集約(P1c §5)。\n    # ENH-04: Select AI Agent(ADB DBネイティブ)\n    if agent_dispatch.is_select_ai_agent(agent_def):\n        return agent_dispatch.select_ai_stream_response(req, user, agent_def)\n\n    # 短期メモリ(CHAT-06): Responses系のみ。再生成時(persist_user=false)は\n        # Conversation側のアイテム重複を避けるためステートレスにフォールバック\n        if MODELS[req.model].api == \"responses\" and req.persist_user:\n            oci_conv = conv.get(\"oci_conversation_id\")\n            if not oci_conv:\n                try:\n                    # クライアント切断→上流打ち切り(CHAT-08)\n\n    def persist(role: str, content: str) -> None:\n        \"\"\"永続化失敗でチャットは止めない(ログのみ)\"\"\"\n        try:\n            conv_repo.append_message(req.conversation_id, role, content)\n        except Exception:\n            logger.exception(\"persist failed\")\n\n    def put_event(ev) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"キューへ投入。キャンセル検知でFalse(満杯キューでのデッドロック防止)\"\"\"\n        fut = asyncio.run_coroutine_threadsafe(queue.put(ev), loop)\n        while True:\n            try:\n                fut.result(timeout=1.0)\n                return True\n            except TimeoutError:\n                if cancel.is_set():\n                    fut.cancel()\n                    return False\n\n    def produce() -> None:\n        parts: list[str] = []\n        usage: dict | None = None\n        cancelled = False\n        upstream = None\n        try:\n            gen_params = GenParams(\n                top_p=req.top_p,\n                max_tokens=req.max_tokens,\n                reasoning_effort=req.reasoning_effort,\n                file_search_store=rag_store,\n            )\n            eff_model = agent_def[\"model\"] if agent_def else req.model\n            use_agent_loop = req.agent or bool(\n                agent_def and (agent_def[\"enabled_tools\"] or mcp_defs)\n            )\n            if use_agent_loop:\n                # エージェントモード(AGT-01/03): ステートレス・短期メモリ非統合\n                upstream = _stream_agent(\n                    eff_model,\n                    [m.model_dump() for m in req.messages],\n                    req.temperature,\n                    user=user.subject,\n                    auto_tools=(\n                        agent_def[\"auto_tools\"] if agent_def else req.auto_tools\n                    ),\n                    tool_results=req.tool_results,\n                    params=gen_params,\n                    enabled_tools=(\n                        agent_def[\"enabled_tools\"] if agent_def else req.enabled_tools\n                    ),\n                    mcp_servers=mcp_defs,\n                    instructions=agent_def[\"instructions\"] if agent_def else None,\n                    project_ocid=agent_def.get(\"project_ocid\") if agent_def else None,\n                    rag_store=agent_rag_store,\n                )\n            elif agent_def:\n                # Project分離のため既定会話は使わない\n                    params=gen_params,\n                    project_ocid=agent_def.get(\"project_ocid\"),\n                )\n            else:\n                plain_msgs = [m.model_dump() for m in req.messages]\n                if req.images:\n                    # 最終userメッセージをcontent partsへ(MM-01。chat系は素通しで届く)\n                    plain_msgs[-1] = {\n                        \"role\": \"user\",\n                        \"content\": [\n                            {\"type\": \"text\", \"text\": plain_msgs[-1][\"content\"]},\n                            *[\n                                {\"type\": \"image_url\", \"image_url\": {\"url\": u}}\n                                for u in req.images\n                            ],\n                        ],\n                    }\n                upstream = _stream_chat(\n                    req.model,\n                    plain_msgs,\n                    req.temperature,\n                    user=user.subject,\n                    oci_conversation_id=oci_conv,\n                    params=gen_params,\n                )\n            if req.conversation_id and req.persist_user:\n                persist(\"user\", req.messages[-1].content)\n            for ev in upstream:\n                if \"delta\" in ev:\n                    parts.append(ev[\"delta\"])\n                if \"usage\" in ev:\n                    usage = ev[\"usage\"]\n                if \"citations\" in ev:  # 日本語ファイル名の文字化け対策(元名へ解決)\n                    ev[\"citations\"] = rag.resolve_citation_filenames(\n                        rag_ns, ev[\"citations\"]\n                    )\n                if cancel.is_set() or not put_event(ev):\n                    cancelled = True\n                    log_with(\n                        logger, logging.INFO, \"upstream cancelled\",\n                        model=req.model, user=user.subject, partial_chars=len(\"\".join(parts)),\n                    )\n                    break\n        except Exception as e:\n            # 上流LLMストリームを打ち切る(CHAT-08)\n            if req.conversation_id and parts:\n                persist(\"assistant\", \"\".join(parts))\n            if req.conversation_id and usage:\n                try:\n                    conv_repo.log_usage(\n                        user.subject, req.conversation_id, req.model,\n                        usage.get(\"input_tokens\", 0), usage.get(\"output_tokens\", 0),\n                    )\n                except Exception:\n                    logger.exception(\"usage log failed\")\n            # 監査ログ(SEC-02): 会話の有無に関わらず記録\n            audit.log_event(\n                user.subject, audit_feature, model=req.model,\n                input_tokens=(usage or {}).get(\"input_tokens\"),\n                output_tokens=(usage or {}).get(\"output_tokens\"),\n                status=\"cancelled\" if cancelled else \"ok\",\n                meta=req.agent_id,\n            )\n            if not cancelled:\n                put_event(None)\n\n    async def gen():\n        yield KEEPALIVE_FRAME\n        if fallback_notice:\n            yield f\"data: {json.dumps({'notice': fallback_notice}, ensure_ascii=False)}\\n\\n\"\n        producer = loop.run_in_executor(None, produce)\n        try:\n            while True:\n                try:\n                    ev = await asyncio.wait_for(queue.get(), timeout=KEEPALIVE_SECONDS)\n                except TimeoutError:\n                    yield KEEPALIVE_FRAME\n                    continue\n                if ev is None:\n                    break\n                yield f\"data: {json.dumps(ev, ensure_ascii=False)}\\n\\n\"\n            yield \"data: [DONE]\\n\\n\"\n        finally:\n            #                    calls.append(item)\n                elif itype == \"mcp_approval_request\":\n                    mcp_approvals.append(item)\n            elif etype == \"response.completed\":\n \"\"\"function_callバッチをUIへ承認待ちとして通知(混在バッチは全件承認制)。\"\"\"\n    for cd in call_dicts:\n        tool = tools.get(cd[\"name\"])\n        yield {\"tool_call\": {\n            \"name\": cd[\"name\"],\n            \"label\": tool.label if tool else cd[\"name\"],\n            \"arguments\": cd.get(\"arguments\", \"{}\"),\n            \"call_id\": cd.get(\"call_id\"),\n            \"item\": cd,\n            \"status\": \"pending_approval\",\n        }}\n\n\ndef _run_tool_calls(\n    call_dicts: list[dict],\n    base_input: list[dict],\n    user: str,\n    tools: dict,\n    execute_tool: Any,\n    tool_error: type[Exception],\n) -> Iterator[ChatEvent]:\n    \"\"\"function_callを実行し結果を base_input へ追記(自動実行ホップ)。\"\"\"\n    for cd in call_dicts:\n        tool = tools.get(cd[\"name\"])\n        yield function_callを {\"tool_call\"} イベントで通知してストリーム終了\n      (UIが承認後、tool_results付きで再呼び出しして継続する)\n    - auto_tools=True: サーバー側で実行し最大MAX_TOOL_HOPSホップまで自動継続\n    \"\"\"\n    from .tools import TOOLS, ToolError, execute_tool\n\n    model = MODELS[model_key]\n    if model.api != \"responses\":\n        yield {\"error\": \"エージェントモードはResponses系モデルのみ対応です\"}\n        return\n    temp = instructions, tool_results)\n    extra = _extra_responses_params(model, params or GenParams())\n    # ターン内ツール総数の安全弁(AGT-01d): 累積16件以上はツールを外し最終回答を強制\n    force_answer = len(tool_results or []) >= 16\n calls:\n            log_with(logger, logging.INFO, \"agent_done\", model=model_key, user=user)\n            return\n\n        call_dicts = [\n            {k: v for k, v in 全件が承認不要(requires_approval=False)の場合は承認モードでも自動実行して継続\n\n        yield from _run_tool_calls(call_dicts, base_input, user, TOOLS, execute_tool, ToolError)\n\n    # ホップ上限: f'\"y\": [\"数値列名\"], \"title\": \"グラフタイトル(日本語)\", \"reason\": \"選定理由(短く)\"}}\\n'\n        \"ルール: 時系列はline、カテゴリ比較はbar、構成比(5件程度まで)はpie、\"\n        'グラフ化に不適(数値列がない等)なら {\"type\": \"none\", \"reason\": \"...\"}。\\n\\n'\n        f\"元の質問: {question}\\n列: {', '.join(columns)}\\n\"\n        f\"データ(先頭{min(len(rows), 15)}行):\\n{sample}\"\n    )\n    raw = complete_once(\"llama-3.3-70b\", [{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": prompt}], max_chars=1000)\n    m = re.search(r\"\\{.*\\}\", raw, re.S)\n    if not m:\n        return {\"type\": \"none\", \"reason\": \"提案の解析に失敗しました\"}\n    try:\n        spec = json.loads(m.group(0))\n    except json.JSONDecodeError:\n        return {\"type\": \"none\", \"reason\": \"提案の解析に失敗しました\"}\n    if spec.get(\"type\") not in CHART_TYPES:\n        return {\"type\": \"none\", \"reason\": \"未対応のグラフ種別が提案されました\"}\n    if spec[\"type\"] != \"none\":\n        if spec.get(\"x\") not in columns:\n            return {\"type\": \"none\", \"reason\":     \"reason\": str(spec.get(\"reason\") or \"\")[:200],\n    }\n\n# SHサンプルにはコメントが薄いため日本語説明を補完(デモ用キュレーション — SQL-02b)\n_TABLE_DESCRIPTIONS_JA = {\n    \"SALES\": 設定不備で認証を素通りさせない\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=\"OIDC is not configured\")\n\n    try:\n        key = _jwks_client(settings.oidc_jwks_url).get_signing_key_from_jwt(token)\n        claims = jwt.decode(\n            token,\n            key.key,\n            algorithms=[\"RS256\"],\n            audience=settings.oidc_audience or None,\n            issuer=settings.oidc_issuer or None,\n            options={\"verify_aud\": bool(settings.oidc_audience)},\n        )\n    except jwt.PyJWTError as e:\n        raise _unauthorized(f\"invalid token: {type(e).__name__}\") from e\n    return AuthContext(subject=str(claims.get(\"sub\", \"\")), claims=claims)\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

Exception) -> bool:\n    return getattr(e, \"status\", None) in (401, 403)\n\n\nclass _ShipThrottle:\n    \"\"\"送信失敗の抑制(PORT-02): 指数バックオフ + N回に1回のstderrサマリ。\n\n    恒常的な401/403(認可エラー)はWARNING1回だけ出し、以後リトライしない\n    (failed()がTrueを返すのでworker側でスレッドを終了=detachする)。\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, name: str):\n        self.name = name\n        self.fail_count = 0\n        self.retry_after = 0.0\n\n    def blocked(self) -> bool:\n        return time.monotonic() < self.retry_after\n\n    def ok(self) -> None:\n        self.fail_count = 0\n        self.retry_after = 0.0\n\n    def failed(self, e: Exception) -> bool:\n        self.fail_count += 1\n        if _is_auth_error(e):\n            _internal.warning(\n                \"%s: 認可エラーのため送信を停止します\"\n                \"(AUTH_MODE設定漏れ/IAMポリシー未整備の可能性): %s\", self.name, e,\n            )\n            return True\n        if self.fail_count == 1 or self.fail_count % 10 == 0:\n            import sys\n\n            print(f\"{self.name} failed x{self.fail_count} (backing off)\", file=sys.stderr)\n        backoff = min(_MAX_BACKOFF_SECONDS, _FLUSH_SECONDS * (2 ** min(self.fail_count, 6)))\n        self.retry_after = time.monotonic() + backoff\n        return False\n\n\ndef _retain_buffer(buf: list, cap: int) -> list:\n    \"\"\"バックオフ中はバッファを破棄せず保持する(直近capまで、超過分は古いものから捨てる)。\n\n > プロセス内キャッシュ > compartment内ACTIVE検索 > 自動作成 の順に解決し、\\\\n# 解決不能なら actionable なメッセージで即時 raise する(空ヘッダは送らない)。\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass ProjectResolutionError(Exception):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"OpenAi-Project に入れる GenerativeAiProject OCID が解決できない。\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n_ACTIONABLE = (\\\\n    \\\\\\\"GenerativeAI project を解決できません(RAG / Responses / \\\\\\\"(DG matching rule / リージョンの agentic API 対応も確認)\\\\\\\"\\\\n)\\\\n\\\\n_project_lock = threading.Lock()\\\\n_project_cache: str | None = None\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _reset_project_cache() ->            return created.id\\\\n        if state in (\\\\\\\"FAILED\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"DELETING\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"DELETED\\\\\\\"):\\\\n            break\\\\n        time.sleep(2)\\\\n        created =
